description_for_human: Agricultural management system for Ugandan farmers with offline support, market prices, and crop management.
description_for_model: FarmSight is a comprehensive agricultural management system designed for Ugandan farmers. It provides offline support, real-time market prices in UGX, crop management tools, farming calendar, disease identification guides, and multi-language support (English, Luganda, Swahili). The platform is a Senior 3 school project focused on 'Utilization of Available Resources for Community Development' in Uganda.
